Then I need to train a supervised model, evaluate accuracy on the provided test set, ensure model size is under 150MB, and save it as `/app/model.bin`.",
  "plan": "I will run a Python script to inspect label distribution and convert train/test parquet files to fasttext format files. I will keep labels as 1-based star ratings. Then I will train an initial fasttext supervised model with reasonable hyperparameters, evaluate on the provided test set, and check model size. Based on the validation accuracy, I can tune hyperparameters or use autotune.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 - <<'PY'
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import pandas as pd
from collections import Counter
for path in ['/app/data/train-00000-of-00001.parquet','/app/data/test-00000-of-00001.parquet']:
    df = pq.read_table(path, columns=['label','text']).to_pandas()
    print(path, 'rows', len(df))
    print('label counts', Counter(df['label']))
    print('text length stats', df['text'].str.len().describe())
    print('sample text repr', repr(df['text'].iloc[0][:200]))
    print()
PY
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 - <<'PY'
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import re, html, unicodedata

def clean(t):
    if t is None:
        return ''
    t = html.unescape(str(t))
    t = t.replace('\r', ' ').replace('\n', ' ').replace('\t', ' ')
    t = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', t).strip()
    t = t.lower()
    return t

def write_ft(path, out):
    df = pq.read_table(path, columns=['label','text']).to_pandas()
    with open(out, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for label, text in zip(df['label'].tolist(), df['text'].tolist()):
            f.write(f'__label__{label} {clean(text)}\n')
    print('wrote', out, 'rows', len(df))

write_ft('/app/data/train-00000-of-00001.parquet', '/app/train.ft')
write_ft('/app/data/test-00000-of-00001.parquet', '/app/test.ft')
PY
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "wc -l /app/train.ft /app/test.ft; head -1 /app/train.ft | cut -c1-200; du -h /app/train.ft /app/test.ft
",
